title: fix: use direct Enter referral link
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Sends users directly to `https://enter.pollinations.ai/?ref=image`
- Records the allowlisted referral with a background beacon
- Removes the redirect behavior from the analytics endpoint
- Adds a regression test and referral URL guidance

Checks:
- `npx vitest run test/referral.test.ts`
- `npm run typecheck`
- legacy `createAndReturnImages` tests

gist.headline: Referrals take the front door
gist.blurb: Image referrals now land directly in Enter, with the little referral pollen recorded quietly in the background. Less redirect choreography, more getting where you meant to go.
gist.summary: Image referral links now send users straight to https://enter.pollinations.ai/?ref=image while a background beacon records the allowlisted referral instead of routing through the analytics redirect endpoint.
gist.impact: Users arriving from image.pollinations.ai get a more direct Enter experience, while referral attribution continues to be captured without an extra redirect.
gist.visual_concept: Polly acts as a friendly guide at a garden path sign pointing directly from an image-flower garden to a cozy Enter gateway, while a tiny background pollen trail quietly reaches a small analytics jar. The scene represents direct navigation with attribution kept out of the user's way.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny guide hat, happily pointing travelers along a direct lime green (#ecf874) garden path to a warm retro computer gateway labeled "ENTER"; a faint trail of pollen drifts quietly into a small jar labeled "REF" beside blooming code-plants. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, dark purple (#110518) outlines, emotionally warm and inviting.
